comment.name: Comment
comment.text:
Afternoon Report


Last Updated: 3/29/26 | 1:05PM

Good afternoon, Sunday River!

Pond-A-Palooza did not disappoint this morning. Some clean skims, some absolute yard sales, all of it worth watching.

The afternoon is wide open and skiing great. Soft snow, good coverage, and a few solid hours left to take advantage. Last chair at 4PM, don't waste it.

Quick heads up as we shift gears into our spring schedule: White Heat Quad and Little White Cap Quad are done for the season. Today is the final day for White Cap Quad, Chondola, Merrill Hill Triple, and the conveyors. South Ridge Express goes down after today and returns next weekend.

Translation: if there's a lift, trail, or zone you've been putting off, this is your last shot for a bit. Go get it.

Looking ahead, don't miss next weekend. Bust 'N' Burn is back, and this year it's taking over Monday Mourning. This is one you don't want to sit out. Be here.

And don't let this one sneak past you either: You've got 4 days left to lock in your 2026/27 New England Pass at the lowest price it'll be. After Thursday at midnight, it jumps.

We'll see ya out there!

-Team Snow

comment.name: Comment 2
comment.text:
Good morning, Sunday River!

Mostly sunny start today, with a few clouds rolling through mid-day. Nothing that should get in the way of a good day outside.

Temps around the mountain this morning: 16 at Locke, 18 at North Peak, 15 in Jordan, 16 at White Cap. Highs land around 20 up top and 28 at the base. Close enough to spring that you might be tempted to dress lighter but maybe don't get too ambitious.

The grooming team went wall-to-wall overnight, so it's clean, fresh corduroy across all eight peaks. If you want it at its best, first chair at 8AM is the move.

Pond-A-Palooza kicks off at 11AM in Wonderland. Over 100 people, skis and boards, one very cold pond. Some will make it across. Many will not. Either way, it's always worth watching.

Quick operations note as we shift into spring: White Heat Quad and Little White Cap Quad wrapped up yesterday. Today is the last day for White Cap Quad, Chondola, Merrill Hill Triple, and the conveyors. South Ridge Express goes offline after today and comes back next weekend.

If there's anything off those lifts you've been meaning to lap, this is your window. Consider this your friendly nudge.

Also, 4 days left to renew your 2026/27 New England Pass at the lowest rate. After Thursday, April 2, at midnight, that price is gone.

We'll see you out there!

-Team Snow
